name: Callao
summary: The port for which the schooner Emma of Auckland sailed on February 20th with a complement of eleven men.
description: Callao was the destination of the two-masted schooner Emma of Auckland, which sailed for it on February 20th with a complement of eleven men.

sources.quote: had been second mate of the two-masted schooner Emma of Auckland, which sailed for Callao February 20th, with a complement of eleven men
sources.context: Chapter 3, The Madness from the Sea
